content:
## Page Section / Title
Corporate.

## All Verbatim Text
- Corporate.

## Visual Elements
- **Logos**: The "aisalon" logo appears on the lanyard (black strap with white text) and on the ID card (black text). The logo consists of lowercase "ai" stacked above "salon" (with "s" and "a" stylized in a connected, modern font). The tagline "EMPOWERING AI CONNECTIONS" appears in small, uppercase letters below the logo on the ID card.
- **Color Palette**: 
  - White (ID card background)
  - Black (text, lanyard strap)
  - Teal (background of the right-side ID card mockup)
  - Gradient: Pink-to-blue (geometric accent on the ID card photo frame)
- **Typography**: 
  - "ATTENDANT" (small, uppercase, sans-serif)
  - "Name Surname" (bold, sans-serif, large)
  - "COMPANY SIGHTBOX" (small, uppercase, sans-serif)
  - "Buenos Aires" (vertical, sans-serif)
  - "AGO 05" (small, uppercase, sans-serif)
  - "aisalon" (stylized, connected sans-serif)
  - "EMPOWERING AI CONNECTIONS" (small, uppercase, sans-serif)
- **Imagery / photography**: A professional headshot of a smiling man (neutral expression, clean background) used as the ID card photo. The photo is framed by a geometric shape with a pink-to-blue gradient.
- **Iconography**: No distinct icons; the geometric shape framing the photo serves as a decorative element.
- **Layout grid**: The page is split into two vertical sections: left (gray background) with a flat ID card mockup, right (teal background) with a 3D ID card mockup on a lanyard. The left section has a centered ID card; the right section has the ID card positioned diagonally with the lanyard extending to the top right.
- **Geometric / decorative elements**: A geometric, angular shape (resembling a polygon) with a pink-to-blue gradient, used to frame the ID card photo. The shape adds a modern, tech-inspired accent.

## Page Layout Summary
The page is divided into two equal vertical columns. The left column (gray background) displays a flat, centered ID card mockup. The right column (teal background) shows a 3D ID card mockup on a lanyard, positioned diagonally with the lanyard extending to the top right. The "Corporate." title is at the top left of the left column.

## Design Rules / Guidance Visible on Page
- The ID card must include: "ATTENDANT" (top), "Name Surname" (bold), "COMPANY SIGHTBOX" (below name), a headshot framed by a geometric gradient shape, "Buenos Aires" (vertical text), "AGO 05" (small text), and the "aisalon" logo with tagline.
- The lanyard must display the "aisalon" logo in white text on a black strap.
- The ID card background is white, with text in black (except the gradient shape).
- The 3D mockup uses a teal background to highlight the ID card and lanyard.
